emails.subject: Kennecott ETA Amendment Letter
emails.body: Kennecott ETA Amendment Letter David: Enclosed is a new draft of the Kennecott amendment letter. Mark and I have discussed the counterparty termination language and have come up with the language that I have high;lighted. Upon your approval, I plan to use the same language for the Duke and Cinnergy letters. Carol St. Clair EB 3892 713-853-3989 (Phone) 713-646-3393 (Fax)

emails.subject: Re: Kennecott ETA Amendment Letter
emails.body: Re: Kennecott ETA Amendment Letter Paragraph 3: Same concern as in last email. Paragraph 4: Are we happy to forego the application of the liabilities clause whenever a Counterparty does a transaction under a Master agreement, instead of a GTC? Dave Carol St Clair ECT 05/11/2000 07:12 PM
